subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God, my Creator, my Origin, my Protector and my Refuge! Thou art the One Who sheddeth the effulgent rays of love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی و مبدعی و مبدای و حرزی و موئلی انت الفائض بانوار الحب
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @love of God
